title: Market Brief — Monday, May 18, 2026
summary: GPU compute is in severe shortage across all classes. H100 availability sits at 10% (36/364), B200 at 14% (109/482), and H200 is tightest among newer chips at 21% (53/320). The scarcity is repricing fast: H100 spot surged 46.7% day-over-day to $2.93/hr, with H200 and B200 following at +33.3% and +19.1% respectively. This is a supply squeeze, not a demand fade.
paragraphs: GPU compute is in severe shortage across all classes. H100 availability sits at 10% (36/364), B200 at 14% (109/482), and H200 is tightest among newer chips at 21% (53/320). The scarcity is repricing fast: H100 spot surged 46.7% day-over-day to $2.93/hr, with H200 and B200 following at +33.3% and +19.1% respectively. This is a supply squeeze, not a demand fade.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B inference runs $10.73/M on H100, $9.58/M on H200, and $4.58/M on B200. Anyone offering 70B-class models under $1/M output is burning cash. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.38/M output is selling at a loss of roughly $4.20/M tokens on B200, the cheapest viable hardware. Grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

OpenAI's o3 Pro at $80/M output is overvalued when GPT-5.4 benchmarks comparably at $15/M, an 80% discount for marginal quality loss. B200 spot at $5.00/hr is undervalued against its OCPI trade price of $5.73/hr with utilization climbing to 85.5%, so lock in reserved B200 capacity now before availability drops below 10%.
bullets: 10% of H100 GPUs are available, meaning 328 of 364 units are currently occupied.
14% B200 availability with utilization up 5.6 percentage points in 30 days signals tightening supply.
$2.93 median H100 spot is up 46.7% in a single day, the largest move across all GPU classes.
21.76 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen 78% since GPT-4 launch.
$0.06 per million output tokens for open-source 8B models is 1,333x cheaper than o3 Pro.
121.7% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the riskiest GPU class to hold unhedged.
